lines.speaker: Inga
lines.text: I think the locals are taking a liking to us! One of them hasn't stopped wearing those clothes Arnkel sold her. Much better than those piddly little things she was wearing before!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think they're piddly because of how warm it is here...

lines.speaker: Inga
lines.text: Bah! A bit of heat never hurt anyone.

lines.speaker: Inga
lines.text: Oh stop your whining, traveller! Now, I think it's time for a drink.

lines.speaker: Inga
lines.text: Oh stop your whining, [Fremennik name]! Now, I think it's time for a drink.
